name: Mrs Fields Black and Whites
recipeIngredient: 5 1/4 ounces Semisweet chocolate bar - coarsely chop
5 1/4 ounces White chocolate bar - coarsely chop
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt. Mix well with a wire whisk.
3. Set aside.
4. Blend sugars in a large bowl using an electric mixer set at medium speed.
5. Add butter and mix to form a grainy paste, scraping down the sides of the bowl.
6. Add eggs and vanilla, and beat at medium speed until smooth.
7. Add the flour mixture and chocolates, and blend at low speed until just combined.
8. Do not overmix.
9. Drop by rounded tablespoons onto ungreased cookie sheets, 2 inches apart.
10. Bake for 23-25 minutes.
11. Transfer cookies immediately to a cool flat surface.
Yield: 3 dozen.
